title: ITALY enforcement action against Unleadmited S.r.l. (5,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 5,000 on Unleadmited S.r.l. The controller operated a lead-generation business for direct marketing purposes and collected personal data through a website that was presented as a comparison portal. This data was then disclosed to third parties for their...
